src: Earlier , he had been amazed by the amount of sludge being discharged by his pores , so before going back to the hot - rooms , he went to the wash handbasin and scrubbed his face with a will , and imagined all his blackheads disappearing down the drain along with the waste water .
mt: Anksčiau jis buvo nustebęs dėl sludge kiekio, kuris buvo išleistas iš jo porų, todėl prieš sugrįžtant į karštus kambarius, jis nuėjo į vonios kriauklę ir sušlapino savo veidą su noru, ir įsivaizdavo, kad visi jo juodlūs išnyks nuo kanalizacijos kartu su nuotekomis.

src: She was a very nice girl named Eugena , I think , and there were guards at the end of the hotel corridors , I remember giving them the slip and wandering around Khabarovsk on my own in a snowstorm , only to be told the next day that there was quite a bit of excitement in the city during the night because a Siberian tiger had come into the city and was wandering the streets at the same time I was !
mt: Ég man að hún var mjög sæt stúlka sem hét Eugena og að það voru vörður á enda hótelsins. Ég minnist að ég sleppti þeim og rólaði um Khabarovsk í snjókomu á eigin spýtur. Þegar ég kom heim þann daginn var ég sagt frá því að það hefði verið mikill uppþot í borginni um nóttina þar sem Siberian Tiger hafði komið inn í borgina og var að ganga um göturnar á sama tíma og ég var þar!

src: Far from slaking his thirst , all his weekend with her had done was whet his appetite and leave him with a desperate craving for more .
mt: Ég var ekki sáttur við það sem ég hafði fengið, en allt helgarhátíðin með henni hafði bara vakið hungurinn minn enn frekar og gert mig langa eftir meira.

src: All of this activity has meant that aircraft and artefact restoration has necessarily taken to the back - burner , but , to quote one of the volunteers : ‘ no building , no aircraft in the long term’ .
mt: Toate aceste activități au însemnat că restaurarea avioanelor și a artefactelor a fost nevoită să se mute pe plan secund, dar, după cum spune unul dintre voluntari: "fără construcție, nu avioane în termen lung".

src: Gravity did the dirty work .
mt: Gravitāte paveica netīro darbu.

src: She did n't snap his head off when he suggested she gave him a hand with the laying of the tables for the morning .
mt: Ég gerði ekki skjóta höfuð hans af þegar hann lagði til að ég gaf honum aðstoð með því að leggja borðin fyrir morguninn.

src: The Turkish people are sitting tight , watching the skies and CNN .
mt: Turkler gökyüzünü ve CNN'yi izleyerek sabırla bekliyorlar.

src: Keep cool to avoid cot deaths
mt: Rămâi calm pentru a evita decesele cotice.

src: And er when I first came to the shop , the mo m A lot of them used to come by train and you know taxis or meeting and at the station and and away from Holyhead they used to stop by the shop for fruit .
mt: Ég kom fyrst til verslunarinnar með lest og þú veist, með leigubílum eða fundum og á stöðinni og langt frá Holyhead þeir stöðvuðu í versluninni fyrir ávöxtum.

src: It was n't it was more like twenty past and I was deep in the land of nod
mt: Ég var ekki í nóttinni þegar klukkan var um tuttugu mínútur og ég var djúpt í landi nod.

src: We have been living beyond our means for too long and had better start tightening our belts . ’
mt: Égum verið lifandi yfir megin okkar of lengi og ætti að byrja að þrengja belti okkar.

src: Shout , they 'd shout something but er well since we 've been living up here , my mother used to give , the man used to come for the order for the grocery , the baker used to come round , the milk used to come round , they all used to come round at she 'd ha she did n't have go out for heavy loads of stuff to bring in it was all delivered , but when they started some new technique of er of ordering by computer , it 's going to come back to square one again you know , they 'll be delivering stuff in the same jolly old way hey .
mt: Ég skrifaði þetta fyrir þig, þeir myndu hæða eitthvað en vel síðan við höfum verið að búa hér, móðir mín notaði að gefa, maðurinn notaði að koma fyrir pöntun fyrir matvöru, bökkið notaði að koma í kring, mjólkina notaði að koma í kring, þeir allir notaði að koma í kring þegar hún myndi hafa hún gerði ekki þurft að fara út fyrir þungar hlaða af hlutum til að koma inn það var allt afhent, en þegar þeir byrjuðu sumir nýr aðferðir af er af pöntun með tölvu, það er að fara aftur til fyrsta einingu aftur þú veist, þeir munu vera að afhenda hlutum í sama jolly gamla hátt hey.

src: If they have been used to rushing home from work or watching the clock during any stolen time with friends , they may find it hard to adapt to the fact that there is no longer any need to hurry back .
mt: Jika mereka sudah terbiasa dengan berlari pulang dari kerja atau menonton jam saat waktu bersama teman-teman , mereka mungkin akan kesulitan untuk beradaptasi dengan fakta bahwa tidak ada lagi kebutuhan untuk terburu-buru kembali .

src: She 'd fancied him for ages and when he asked her out she managed to keep her cool even though she felt faint .
mt: Ég hafði verið að hugsa um hann í langan tíma og þegar hann spurði mig út fékk ég að halda kólnum mínum þrátt fyrir að ég væri að verða fyrir þreytu.

src: She could never get over her lucky escapes .
mt: Ég gat aldrei fengið yfir heppnir flýir hennar.

src: As Bailey said , the two of them never saw eye to eye .
mt: Bailey aytganidek, ularning ko'zlariga ko'ra, ular bir-birlariga qarshi edi.

src: Mind you , he 'd come home from university one time to see me in bed with flu , glasses and no front teeth , so I guess he was pretty immune to my charmlessness — or was too shortsighted himself to notice .
mt: Ég skal nefna að hann hafði komið heim frá háskóla einu sinni til að sjá mig í rúmi með flensu, glös og engum framan tennur, svo ég gæti verið mjög ólíklegur til að vera með myndir hans - eða var of skammt til að taka eftir því.

src: Burun clenched his fists and bit his tongue to stop himself from shouting out .
mt: Burun serrava i pugni e morsicava la lingua per non urlare.

src: They liked to keep tabs on you even then .
mt: Atunci, îi plăcea să te urmărească.

src: ' Get a grip , Aurora , ' she told herself sternly as she rummaged in the cupboard .
mt: ' Get a grip , Aurora , ' she told herself sternly as she rummaged in the cupboard .

src: If they equate punishment with physical punishment , I can see their point and would generally agree with them ( although most parents would feel that such a proposition is very difficult to apply ) .
mt: Jika mereka mengaitkan hukuman dengan hukuman fizikal, saya dapat melihat sudut pandangan mereka dan secara amnya bersetuju dengan mereka ( walaupun kebanyakan ibu bapa akan merasakan bahawa cadangan tersebut sangat sukar untuk diterapkan ) .

src: Mona , who had her daughter Soraya and a nanny with her , also picked up the tab for expensive dinners at trendy restaurants .
mt: Monica, care avea cu ea pe Soraya și o îngrijitoare, plătea și pentru cina de lux la restaurante trendy.

src: Unless you are fortunate enough to possess one of the new super - format camcorders in which these defects have been ironed out , the solution is to steer clear of such subjects .
mt: Jika anda tidak beruntung untuk memiliki salah satu camcorder super-format baru di mana kecacatan telah ditegakkan, penyelesaian adalah untuk mengelakkan subjek tersebut.

src: She had once explained that slaughtering animals secretly and trading on the black market was simply bending the law a little and not really stealing at all , but real thieves were as bad as liars .
mt: Ég hafði einu sinni útskýrt að dýralátun leyndarmálum og viðskipti á svörtum markaði var einfaldlega beygja lögin smá og ekki raunverulega stela í öllu , en raunverulegir þjófar voru eins og lygarar .

src: That kept the wolf from the door for a little while , I think .
mt: Ég held að það haldið úlfann frá dyrum í smá stund.

src: One of them saw a tarnished wristwatch lying on the beach and decided to play a practical joke .
mt: Unul dintre ei a văzut un ceas cu mâneci deteriorate aflat pe plajă și a decis să joace un glumă practică.

src: We have been to one town where many have closed down , and others are struggling to keep their heads above water …
mt: Égum verið til einar borgar þar sem margir hafa lokað og aðrir eru að berjast til að halda höfðum yfir vatninu.

src: so you know at a pinch you could probably run it like that and I do n't suppose anybody would notice the difference but , you know , just in terms of you know making things look attractive
mt: Jadi kamu tahu pada saat-saat genting kamu mungkin bisa menjalankannya seperti itu dan aku tidak menyangka siapa pun akan memperhatikan perbedaan itu, tapi kamu tahu, hanya dalam hal kamu tahu membuat hal-hal terlihat menarik.

src: Keep tucked in behind the side always said to you , the bloke in the front , mate , he does all the donkey work , picking up drags you round do n't it ?
mt: Ég held að þú sért alltaf að fara með það sem er að baki, vinur. Hann er alltaf að gera allt það erfiða vinur, þar sem hann er að taka upp drags og þú ert að fara með það. Er það ekki?

src: If anyone in the SSD can shed any light on the matter , or better still on the origins of the letter , she or he will immediately be nominated reader of the week , be the envy of all and sundry , and receive a special prize .
mt: Jika ada orang di SSD yang dapat memberikan penjelasan tentang hal ini, atau lebih baik lagi tentang asal surat itu, mereka akan segera dinominasikan sebagai pembaca mingguan, menjadi iri hati semua orang, dan menerima hadiah khusus.

src: Perhaps because he plays the field .
mt: Võib-olla seetõttu, et ta mängib väljakul.

src: She calls the shots and the people she meets have to dance to her tune if they are going to get on with her .
mt: Ég kallar skotin og fólk sem ég hitti verður að dansa til tóna hennar ef þeir vilja vera í góðu samstarfi við hana.

src: Several papers report on Goldie the goldfish which was apparently brought back from the dead when its owner gave it the kiss of life and poured whisky down its throat .
mt: Beberapa kertas telah melaporkan tentang Goldie ikan emas yang dikatakan telah dibawa kembali dari kematian apabila pemiliknya memberinya ciuman kehidupan dan meminumkan wiski ke dalam mulutnya.

src: She 's got to rack her brain through er
mt: Ég verð að rækta heila mína í gegnum hana.

src: Pipe down , sorry , get out .
mt: Calmează-te, scuze, pleacă.

src: They must needs add insult to injury . ’
mt: Ég þarf að bæta við meiðsli.

src: If the board is sailed too close to the wind , the so called ‘ no-go ’ zone is entered within which the board will stop or even blow backwards .
mt: Jika papan disayap terlalu dekat dengan angin, zona yang disebut 'no-go' akan dimasuki di mana papan akan berhenti atau bahkan berbalik arah.
